title: Add non-record local A100 PR60-stack reproduction
body:
Adds a non-record 16MB submission folder for a local 1xA100 reproduction of the PR60-style stack (10L + FP16 tied embedding export + Muon WD + overtone init + residual mix + sliding eval).

  Key result: final_int8_zlib_roundtrip_exact val_bpb = 1.41057617
  Size: 11,124,153 bytes (int8+zlib total)
  Train cap: 600s (step 716)

  Included:
  - README.md
  - submission.json
  - train.log
  - train_gpt.py (exact snapshot used)
